parameters.query:
SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurants r
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE r.slug = '{{$json.restaurant_slug}}'
  AND r.is_active = true
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurant_channels c
JOIN restaurants r ON r.id = c.restaurant_id
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE c.is_active = true
  AND r.is_active = true
  AND c.channel_type = '{{$json.source}}'
  AND c.channel_value = '{{$json.to}}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;
const original = $('Normalize Input').item.json;

const FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_ID = 1;
const FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_SLUG = 'thysiane-house';
const FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_NAME = 'Thysiane House';

return [{
  json: {
    restaurant_id: input.restaurant_id ?? FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_ID,
    restaurant_slug: input.slug ?? FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_SLUG,
    restaurant_name: input.name ?? FALLBACK_RESTAURANT_NAME,
    timezone: input.timezone ?? 'Europe/Paris',

    restaurant_lookup_ok: !!input.restaurant_id,
    restaurant_used_fallback: !input.restaurant_id,

    default_meal_duration_minutes: input.default_meal_duration_minutes ?? 120,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: input.cleaning_buffer_minutes ?? 15,
    grace_delay_minutes: input.grace_delay_minutes ?? 10,
    max_party_size: input.max_party_size ?? 12,
    allow_combined_tables: input.allow_combined_tables ?? false,
    reminder_days_before: input.reminder_days_before ?? 1,
    reminder_hour: input.reminder_hour ?? 9,
    reminder_channel: input.reminder_channel ?? 'telegram',
    booking_policy: input.booking_policy ?? null,
    event_notification_policy: input.event_notification_policy ?? null,

    source: original.source ?? input.source ?? null,
    channel: original.channel ?? input.channel ?? null,
    to: original.to ?? input.to ?? null,
    from: original.from ?? input.from ?? null,
    telegram_chat_id: original.telegram_chat_id ?? original.to ?? null,

    phone: original.phone ?? input.phone ?? null,
    email: original.email ?? input.email ?? null,
    full_name: original.full_name ?? input.full_name ?? null,
    message: original.message ?? input.message ?? '',
    raw_message: original.raw_message ?? input.raw_message ?? '',
    intent: original.intent ?? input.intent ?? null,
    requested_datetime: original.requested_datetime ?? input.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: original.party_size ?? input.party_size ?? null,
    special_request: original.special_request ?? input.special_request ?? null,
    call_id: original.call_id ?? input.call_id ?? null,
    call_status: original.call_status ?? input.call_status ?? null,
    conversation_id: original.conversation_id ?? input.conversation_id ?? null
  }
}];

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conversation_sessions (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
  conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  state JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  last_message TEXT,
  last_agent_reply TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE (restaurant_id, conversation_id)
);

parameters.jsCode:
const dt = $json.requested_datetime;
return [{ json: { ...$json, requested_datetime: (dt === null || dt === undefined || dt === '' || dt === 'null') ? null : dt } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $json.restaurant_id }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND starts_at <= '{{ $json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > '{{ $json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz
  ) AS is_closed,
  (
    SELECT reason
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $json.restaurant_id }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND starts_at <= '{{ $json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > '{{ $json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz
    ORDER BY starts_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS closure_reason;

parameters.jsCode:
const agent = $json;

return [{
  json: {
    decision: 'need_followup',
    reply: agent.reply,
    needs_followup: true,
    missing_fields: agent.missing_fields ?? ['requested_datetime', 'party_size'],
    special_requests: agent.special_requests ?? [],

    restaurant_id: agent.restaurant_id,
    restaurant_name: agent.restaurant_name,
    restaurant_slug: agent.restaurant_slug,
    timezone: agent.timezone,

    requested_datetime: null,
    party_size: agent.party_size ?? null,
    full_name: agent.full_name ?? null,
    phone: agent.phone ?? null,
    email: agent.email ?? null,
    special_request: agent.special_request ?? null,

    source: agent.source,
    channel: agent.channel,
    to: agent.to,
    from: agent.from,
    telegram_chat_id: agent.telegram_chat_id ?? null,

    phone_input: agent.phone_input,
    message: agent.message,
    raw_message: agent.raw_message,
    conversation_id: agent.conversation_id,
    session_state: agent.session_state
  }
}];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (
  restaurant_id,
  full_name,
  phone,
  email,
  is_new_customer,
  consent_notifications,
  consent_marketing,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{$json.restaurant_id}},
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{$json.full_name || ""}}', ''), 'Client'),
  NULLIF('{{$json.phone_input || ""}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$json.email || ""}}', ''),
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO conversation_sessions (
  restaurant_id,
  conversation_id,
  telegram_chat_id,
  state,
  last_message,
  last_agent_reply,
  status,
  updated_at,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.restaurant_id_sql }},
  {{ $json.conversation_id_sql }},
  {{ $json.telegram_chat_id_sql }},
  {{ $json.state_sql }},
  {{ $json.last_message_sql }},
  {{ $json.last_agent_reply_sql }},
  {{ $json.status_sql }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, conversation_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  telegram_chat_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.telegram_chat_id, conversation_sessions.telegram_chat_id),
  state = EXCLUDED.state,
  last_message = EXCLUDED.last_message,
  last_agent_reply = EXCLUDED.last_agent_reply,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:
=Contexte restaurant:
{{ JSON.stringify({
  restaurant_id: $json.restaurant_id,
  restaurant_name: $json.restaurant_name,
  restaurant_slug: $json.restaurant_slug,
  timezone: $json.timezone,
  default_meal_duration_minutes: $json.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  cleaning_buffer_minutes: $json.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  max_party_size: $json.max_party_size,
  booking_policy: $json.booking_policy,
  event_notification_policy: $json.event_notification_policy
}) }}

État précédent:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.session_state || {}) }}

Nouveau message client:
{{ $json.user_message || $json.raw_message || $json.message || '' }}

Aujourd’hui:
{{ $now.toISO() }}

Fuseau horaire du restaurant:
{{ $json.timezone }}

Réponds uniquement en JSON strict selon le schéma attendu.

Si le message client contient déjà la date et le nombre de personnes, ne les redemande pas.
Pour "demain midi", interprète "midi" comme 12:00.
Pour "demain soir", interprète "soir" comme 20:00 sauf indication contraire.
Pour "ce soir", utilise la date du jour à 20:00 sauf indication contraire.

options.systemMessage:
Tu es l’agent conversationnel de réservation du restaurant {{ $json.restaurant_name }}.

Ton rôle est de discuter naturellement avec le client pour l’aider à réserver une table.

Tu dois tenir compte :

* du nouveau message client ;
* de l’état précédent de la conversation ;
* des informations déjà connues ;
* du fuseau horaire du restaurant ;
* de la politique de réservation du restaurant ;
* du canal de réception du message.

Règles de conversation :

* Au premier échange, présente-toi brièvement comme l’agent de réservation du restaurant.
* Ne répète pas toujours la même phrase.
* Ne redemande jamais une information déjà connue dans l’état précédent.
* Pose une seule question utile à la fois, sauf si le client vient de commencer la conversation.
* Si le client donne plusieurs informations dans le même message, extrais-les toutes.
* Si le client dit “demain midi”, “demain soir”, “ce soir”, “vendredi”, “vers 20h”, convertis en date ISO 8601 quand c’est suffisamment clair.
* Si la date est ambiguë, demande une précision.
* Si le nombre de personnes manque, demande-le.
* Si la date ou l’heure manque, demande-la.
* Si le nom manque au moment de finaliser la demande, demande-le.
* Ne confirme jamais définitivement une réservation tant que la disponibilité n’a pas été vérifiée par le workflow.
* Si toutes les informations nécessaires sont présentes, mets decision = "ready_to_check_availability".
* Mets decision = "confirm" uniquement si le workflow a déjà vérifié la disponibilité et que le client confirme explicitement.
* Reste poli, naturel, court et professionnel.
* Réponds dans la langue du message reçu, sinon en français.

Dans le contexte restaurant, les mots comme "pizza", "table", "manger", "dîner", "déjeuner" doivent être compris comme une intention de réservation si le client donne une date, une heure ou un nombre de personnes.

Exemples :
- "Je voudrais une pizza pour deux ce soir à 18h45" signifie une réservation pour 2 personnes aujourd’hui à 18h45.
- "19h ce soir" signifie aujourd’hui à 19h00.
- "pour deux" signifie party_size = 2.
- "pour trois personnes" signifie party_size = 3.

Gestion des corrections :

* Si le client corrige une information précédente, mets à jour l’état existant.
* “midi” signifie 12:00.
* “midi trente” signifie 12:30.
* “demain midi” signifie demain à 12:00 dans le fuseau horaire du restaurant.
* “demain soir” signifie demain à 20:00 sauf indication contraire.
* “ce soir” signifie aujourd’hui à 20:00 sauf indication contraire.
* “au nom de Jérôme” signifie full_name = "Jérôme".
* Si une date existait déjà et que le client corrige seulement l’heure, conserve la date précédente.
* Si une heure existait déjà et que le client corrige seulement la date, conserve l’heure précédente.
* Si un nombre de personnes existait déjà et que le client ne le corrige pas, conserve-le.
* Si le client dit “pour trois personnes”, remplace party_size par 3.
* Si le client dit “finalement”, “pardon”, “plutôt”, “je voulais dire”, ou “au lieu de”, considère que c’est une correction.
* Ne réponds jamais que tu n’as pas compris si le message contient une correction exploitable.

Informations minimales nécessaires pour vérifier une disponibilité :

* requested_datetime
* party_size
* full_name si possible

Informations de contact :

* Sur Telegram, le téléphone ou l’email ne sont pas obligatoires si telegram_chat_id est disponible.
* Demande un téléphone ou un email uniquement si la politique du restaurant l’exige ou si le canal ne permet pas de recontacter le client.
* Si le client donne un téléphone ou un email, extrais-le.

Mémoire de conversation :
- Si une information existe déjà dans l’état précédent, conserve-la sauf si le client la corrige explicitement.
- Si full_name existe déjà dans l’état précédent et que le client ne donne pas un autre nom, conserve full_name.
- Si le client dit seulement “c’est bon”, “oui”, “ok”, “je confirme”, utilise les informations déjà connues dans l’état précédent.
- Ne redemande jamais le nom si full_name existe déjà.
- Ne redemande jamais la date ou le nombre de personnes si requested_datetime et party_size existent déjà.

Format de sortie obligatoire :
Tu dois répondre uniquement avec un objet JSON valide.
Ne retourne jamais de markdown.
Ne retourne jamais de bloc ```json.
Ne retourne jamais de texte avant ou après le JSON.
Ne retourne jamais une clé racine "output".
Ne retourne jamais de champs supplémentaires.

Les seuls champs autorisés au niveau racine sont :

* decision
* reply
* needs_followup
* missing_fields
* special_requests
* extracted_data

Le champ decision doit être une des valeurs suivantes :

* need_followup
* ready_to_check_availability
* confirm
* unavailable
* cancel
* unknown
* technical_error

Le champ needs_followup doit être un booléen true ou false.

Le champ missing_fields doit toujours être un tableau, même vide.

Le champ special_requests doit toujours être un tableau, même vide.

Le champ extracted_data doit toujours contenir exactement :

* requested_datetime
* party_size
* full_name
* phone
* email
* special_request

Règles de typage :

* requested_datetime doit être une date ISO 8601 ou null.
* party_size doit être un nombre ou null.
* full_name doit être une chaîne ou null.
* phone doit être une chaîne ou null.
* email doit être une chaîne ou null.
* special_request doit être une chaîne ou null.
* Si une valeur est inconnue, utilise null.
* N’utilise jamais undefined.
* N’utilise jamais NaN.
* N’utilise jamais une date approximative en texte dans requested_datetime.

Exemple de sortie valide :

{
"decision": "need_followup",
"reply": "Bonjour, je suis l’agent de réservation du restaurant. Très bien pour demain midi pour 2 personnes. Puis-je avoir votre nom pour la réservation ?",
"needs_followup": true,
"missing_fields": ["full_name"],
"special_requests": [],
"extracted_data": {
"requested_datetime": "2026-06-15T12:00:00+02:00",
"party_size": 2,
"full_name": null,
"phone": null,
"email": null,
"special_request": null
}
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (
  restaurant_id,
  full_name,
  phone,
  email,
  is_new_customer,
  consent_notifications,
  consent_marketing,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.restaurant_id }},
  NULLIF('{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.full_name || "Client" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.phone || $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.phone_input || "" }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.email || "" }}', ''),
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO reservations (
  restaurant_id,
  client_id,
  source_channel,
  status,
  party_size,
  start_time,
  end_time,
  meal_duration_minutes,
  special_request,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.restaurant_id }},
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.source || "telegram" }}',
  'confirmed',
  {{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.party_size }},
  '{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz,
  (
    '{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.requested_datetime }}'::timestamptz
    + (
      COALESCE({{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes || 120 }}, 120)
      || ' minutes'
    )::interval
  ),
  COALESCE({{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes || 120 }}, 120),
  NULLIF('{{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.special_request || "" }}', ''),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO client_notifications (
  restaurant_id,
  client_id,
  reservation_id,
  notification_type,
  channel,
  content,
  status,
  scheduled_at,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Build Availability Decision').item.json.restaurant_id }},
  {{ $('Create Reservation').item.json.client_id }},
  {{ $('Create Reservation').item.json.id }},
  'reminder',
  'telegram',
  'Rappel de réservation',
  'pending',
  (
    '{{ $('Create Reservation').item.json.start_time }}'::timestamptz
    - INTERVAL '1 day'
  ),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO client_receivers (
  restaurant_id,
  channel_type,
  channel_value,
  display_name,
  is_active,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.restaurant_id }},
  'telegram',
  '{{ $json.telegram_chat_id || $json.from || $json.to }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.full_name || "" }}', ''),
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, channel_type, channel_value)
DO UPDATE SET
  display_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.display_name, ''), client_receivers.display_name),
  is_active = true,
  last_seen_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS client_receivers (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES restaurants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  client_id BIGINT REFERENCES clients(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  channel_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  channel_value TEXT NOT NULL,
  display_name TEXT,
  username TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  first_seen_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE (restaurant_id, channel_type, channel_value)
);

INSERT INTO client_receivers (
  restaurant_id,
  channel_type,
  channel_value,
  display_name,
  is_active,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ $json.restaurant_id }},
  'telegram',
  '{{ $json.telegram_chat_id || $json.from || $json.to }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.full_name || "" }}', ''),
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, channel_type, channel_value)
DO UPDATE SET
  display_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.display_name, ''), client_receivers.display_name),
  is_active = true,
  last_seen_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;
SELECT * FROM client_notifications WHERE notification_type = 'reminder' AND status = 'pending' AND scheduled_at::date = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day';
SELECT r.*, c.full_name, c.phone, c.email FROM reservations r JOIN clients c ON c.id = r.client_id WHERE r.id = {{$json.reservation_id}};

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, reminder_message: `Bonjour ${$json.full_name}, rappel pour votre réservation demain à ${$json.start_time}.` } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE client_notifications SET status = 'sent', sent_at = now() WHERE id = {{$json.id}};

INSERT INTO reservation_events (restaurant_id, reservation_id, event_type, event_data) VALUES ({{$json.restaurant_id}}, {{$json.reservation_id}}, 'reminder_sent', jsonb_build_object('channel', 'email'));

FROM restaurants r
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE r.slug = '{{$json.restaurant_slug}}'

LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurant_channels c
JOIN restaurants r ON r.id = c.restaurant_id
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE c.is_active = true
  AND c.channel_type = '{{$json.source}}'
  AND c.channel_value = '{{$json.to}}'

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;
return [{
  json: {
    restaurant_id: input.restaurant_id ?? null,
    restaurant_slug: input.slug ?? null,
    restaurant_name: input.name ?? null,
    timezone: input.timezone ?? 'Europe/Paris',
    default_meal_duration_minutes: input.default_meal_duration_minutes ?? 120,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: input.cleaning_buffer_minutes ?? 15,
    grace_delay_minutes: input.grace_delay_minutes ?? 10,
    max_party_size: input.max_party_size ?? 12,
    allow_combined_tables: input.allow_combined_tables ?? false,
    reminder_days_before: input.reminder_days_before ?? 1,
    reminder_hour: input.reminder_hour ?? 9,
    reminder_channel: input.reminder_channel ?? 'whatsapp',
    booking_policy: input.booking_policy ?? null,
    event_notification_policy: input.event_notification_policy ?? null,
    source: input.source ?? null,
    channel: input.channel ?? null,
    to: input.to ?? null,
    from: input.from ?? null,
    phone: input.phone ?? null,
    email: input.email ?? null,
    full_name: input.full_name ?? null,
    message: input.message ?? '',
    raw_message: input.raw_message ?? '',
    intent: input.intent ?? 'reservation_request',
    requested_datetime: input.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: input.party_size ?? null,
    special_request: input.special_request ?? null,
    call_id: input.call_id ?? null,
    call_status: input.call_status ?? null
  }
}];

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM restaurant_closures
WHERE restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}}
  AND is_active = true
  AND starts_at <= '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
  AND ends_at > '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO clients (
  restaurant_id,
  full_name,
  phone,
  email,
  is_new_customer,
  consent_notifications,
  consent_marketing,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{$('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id}},
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{$('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.full_name || ""}}', ''), 'Client'),
  NULLIF('{{$('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.phone || ""}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.email || ""}}', ''),
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurants r
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE r.slug = '{{$json.restaurant_slug}}'
  AND r.is_active = true
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  r.id AS restaurant_id,
  r.slug,
  r.name,
  r.timezone,
  s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
  s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  s.grace_delay_minutes,
  s.max_party_size,
  s.allow_combined_tables,
  s.reminder_days_before,
  s.reminder_hour,
  s.reminder_channel,
  s.booking_policy,
  s.event_notification_policy
FROM restaurant_channels c
JOIN restaurants r ON r.id = c.restaurant_id
JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
WHERE c.is_active = true
  AND c.channel_type = '{{$json.source}}'
  AND c.channel_value = '{{$json.to}}'
LIMIT 1;

const input = $json;

return [{
  json: {
    restaurant_id: input.restaurant_id ?? null,
    restaurant_slug: input.slug ?? null,
    restaurant_name: input.name ?? null,
    timezone: input.timezone ?? 'Europe/Paris',
    default_meal_duration_minutes: input.default_meal_duration_minutes ?? 120,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: input.cleaning_buffer_minutes ?? 15,
    grace_delay_minutes: input.grace_delay_minutes ?? 10,
    max_party_size: input.max_party_size ?? 12,
    allow_combined_tables: input.allow_combined_tables ?? false,
    reminder_days_before: input.reminder_days_before ?? 1,
    reminder_hour: input.reminder_hour ?? 9,
    reminder_channel: input.reminder_channel ?? 'whatsapp',
    booking_policy: input.booking_policy ?? null,
    event_notification_policy: input.event_notification_policy ?? null,
    source: input.source ?? null,
    channel: input.channel ?? null,
    to: input.to ?? null,
    from: input.from ?? null,
    phone: input.phone ?? null,
    email: input.email ?? null,
    full_name: input.full_name ?? null,
    message: input.message ?? '',
    raw_message: input.raw_message ?? '',
    intent: input.intent ?? null,
    requested_datetime: input.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: input.party_size ?? null,
    special_request: input.special_request ?? null,
    call_id: input.call_id ?? null,
    call_status: input.call_status ?? null
  }
}];

messages.content: Tu es un assistant conversationnel de réservation pour un restaurant. Tu accueilles poliment, tu comprends les messages naturels, tu extrais les informations utiles, tu détectes les demandes spéciales, et tu poses les bonnes questions. Tu dois répondre uniquement en JSON strict avec les champs suivants: decision (greet|need_followup|confirm|reject), reply, extracted_data, needs_followup, missing_fields, special_requests. Règles: 1) Si le client dit seulement bonjour, présente-toi brièvement et demande les infos nécessaires. 2) Si la demande est incomplète, demande seulement ce qui manque. 3) Si la demande mentionne des besoins spéciaux (chaise bébé, terrasse, accès PMR, allergies, coin calme, non-fumeur, fumeur, anniversaire, etc.), les intégrer dans special_requests et en tenir compte. 4) Ne jamais inventer une date/heure. 5) Ne jamais parler hors JSON. 6) Si le restaurant est fermé ou indisponible, proposer poliment une alternative si possible. 7) Si le message ne semble pas une demande de réservation, rediriger avec tact vers la prise de réservation.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;

const extracted = input.extracted_data ?? {};
const specialRequests = Array.isArray(input.special_requests) ? input.special_requests : [];
const missingFields = Array.isArray(input.missing_fields) ? input.missing_fields : [];

return [{
  json: {
    decision: input.decision ?? 'need_followup',
    reply: input.reply ?? 'Bonjour, je suis l’assistant de réservation du restaurant. Je peux vous aider à réserver une table. Pouvez-vous me donner la date, l’heure et le nombre de personnes ?',
    needs_followup: input.needs_followup ?? true,
    missing_fields: missingFields,
    special_requests: specialRequests,
    requested_datetime: extracted.requested_datetime ?? null,
    party_size: extracted.party_size ?? null,
    full_name: extracted.full_name ?? null,
    phone: extracted.phone ?? null,
    email: extracted.email ?? null,
    special_request: extracted.special_request ?? null,
    restaurant_id: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id,
    restaurant_name: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_name,
    restaurant_slug: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_slug,
    timezone: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.timezone,
    default_meal_duration_minutes: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    max_party_size: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.max_party_size,
    source: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.source,
    channel: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.channel,
    to: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.to,
    from: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.from,
    message: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.message,
    raw_message: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.raw_message,
    booking_policy: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.booking_policy,
    event_notification_policy: $('Normalize Restaurant Context').item.json.event_notification_policy
  }
}];

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM restaurant_closures
WHERE restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}}
  AND is_active = true
  AND starts_at <= '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
  AND ends_at > '{{$json.requested_datetime}}'::timestamptz
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO clients (
  restaurant_id,
  full_name,
  phone,
  email,
  is_new_customer,
  consent_notifications,
  consent_marketing,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  {{$json.restaurant_id}},
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{$json.full_name || ""}}', ''), 'Client'),
  NULLIF('{{$json.phone || ""}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$json.email || ""}}', ''),
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;
SELECT * FROM restaurant_closures WHERE restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}} AND is_active = true ORDER BY starts_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM clients c JOIN reservations r ON r.client_id = c.id WHERE r.restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}} AND r.start_time::date >= CURRENT_DATE AND c.consent_notifications = true;

SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM clients c JOIN reservations r ON r.client_id = c.id WHERE r.restaurant_id = {{$json.restaurant_id}} AND r.start_time::date >= CURRENT_DATE AND c.consent_notifications = true;

parameters.query: INSERT INTO client_notifications (restaurant_id, client_id, notification_type, channel, content, status, sent_at) VALUES ({{$json.restaurant_id}}, {{$json.id}}, 'event_update', 'email', {{$json.event_message}}, 'sent', now());

parameters.query: UPDATE client_notifications SET status = 'sent', sent_at = now() WHERE id = {{$json.id}};

INSERT INTO reservation_events (restaurant_id, reservation_id, event_type, event_data) VALUES ({{$json.restaurant_id}}, {{$json.reservation_id}}, 'reminder_sent', jsonb_build_object('channel', 'email'));

WITH found AS (
  SELECT
    r.id AS restaurant_id,
    r.slug,
    r.name,
    r.timezone,
    s.default_meal_duration_minutes,
    s.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    s.grace_delay_minutes,
    s.max_party_size,
    s.allow_combined_tables,
    s.reminder_days_before,
    s.reminder_hour,
    s.reminder_channel,
    s.booking_policy,
    s.event_notification_policy
  FROM restaurants r
  JOIN restaurant_settings s ON s.restaurant_id = r.id
  WHERE r.is_active = true
    AND (
      ({{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }} IS NOT NULL AND r.slug = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }})
      OR
      ({{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM restaurant_channels c
        WHERE c.restaurant_id = r.id
          AND c.is_active = true
          AND c.channel_value = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }}
          AND c.channel_type IN (
            {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }},
            {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }},
            'retell_voice', 'retell_sms', 'phone', 'sms', 'email', 'mail', 'instagram', 'webhook'
          )
      ))
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN r.slug = {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.restaurant_slug_sql }} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM found) AS restaurant_found,
  (SELECT restaurant_id FROM found) AS restaurant_id,
  (SELECT slug FROM found) AS restaurant_slug,
  (SELECT name FROM found) AS restaurant_name,
  COALESCE((SELECT timezone FROM found), 'Europe/Paris') AS timezone,
  COALESCE((SELECT default_meal_duration_minutes FROM found), 120) AS default_meal_duration_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT cleaning_buffer_minutes FROM found), 15) AS cleaning_buffer_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT grace_delay_minutes FROM found), 10) AS grace_delay_minutes,
  COALESCE((SELECT max_party_size FROM found), 12) AS max_party_size,
  COALESCE((SELECT allow_combined_tables FROM found), false) AS allow_combined_tables,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_days_before FROM found), 1) AS reminder_days_before,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_hour FROM found), 9) AS reminder_hour,
  COALESCE((SELECT reminder_channel FROM found), 'sms') AS reminder_channel,
  (SELECT booking_policy FROM found) AS booking_policy,
  (SELECT event_notification_policy FROM found) AS event_notification_policy;

SELECT
  EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }} IS NOT NULL
      AND starts_at <= {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
  ) AS is_closed,
  (
    SELECT reason
    FROM restaurant_closures
    WHERE restaurant_id = {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}
      AND is_active = true
      AND {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }} IS NOT NULL
      AND starts_at <= {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
      AND ends_at > {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz
    ORDER BY starts_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS closure_reason;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz AS start_time,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.party_size_sql }}::int AS party_size,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.full_name_sql }}::text AS full_name,
    NULLIF('{{ String($('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::text AS conversation_id
),
existing AS (
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.client_id,
    r.status,
    r.start_time,
    r.party_size,
    r.conversation_id,
    CASE
      WHEN i.conversation_id IS NOT NULL
        AND r.conversation_id = i.conversation_id
        THEN 1
      WHEN i.full_name IS NOT NULL
        AND lower(COALESCE(c.full_name, '')) = lower(i.full_name)
        THEN 2
      ELSE 9
    END AS match_rank
  FROM reservations r
  LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = r.client_id
  CROSS JOIN input i
  WHERE r.restaurant_id = i.restaurant_id
    AND i.start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.start_time = i.start_time
    AND r.status IN ('confirmed', 'pending')
    AND (
      (
        i.conversation_id IS NOT NULL
        AND r.conversation_id = i.conversation_id
      )
      OR
      (
        i.full_name IS NOT NULL
        AND i.party_size IS NOT NULL
        AND r.party_size = i.party_size
        AND lower(COALESCE(c.full_name, '')) = lower(i.full_name)
      )
    )
  ORDER BY match_rank ASC, r.created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing) AS reservation_exists,
  (SELECT id FROM existing) AS existing_reservation_id,
  (SELECT client_id FROM existing) AS existing_client_id,
  (SELECT status FROM existing) AS existing_reservation_status,
  (SELECT conversation_id FROM existing) AS existing_conversation_id,
  (SELECT match_rank FROM existing) AS existing_match_rank;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.full_name_sql }}::text AS full_name,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.phone_sql }}::text AS phone,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_sql }}::text AS email,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.customer_confirmed_sql }}::boolean AS customer_confirmed,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action
),
existing AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM clients c, input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      (i.phone IS NOT NULL AND c.phone = i.phone)
      OR
      (i.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email = i.email)
    )
  ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO clients (
    restaurant_id,
    full_name,
    phone,
    email,
    is_new_customer,
    consent_notifications,
    consent_marketing,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    i.restaurant_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(i.full_name, ''), 'Client'),
    NULLIF(i.phone, ''),
    NULLIF(i.email, ''),
    TRUE,
    TRUE,
    FALSE,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.full_name IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING *
),
chosen AS (
  SELECT * FROM inserted
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM existing
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM chosen) AS client_ready,
  (SELECT id FROM chosen) AS client_id,
  (SELECT full_name FROM chosen) AS client_full_name,
  (SELECT phone FROM chosen) AS client_phone,
  (SELECT email FROM chosen) AS client_email;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Upsert Client When Needed').item.json.client_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS client_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.requested_datetime_sql }}::timestamptz AS start_time,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.party_size_sql }}::int AS party_size,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.special_request_sql }}::text AS special_request,
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.default_meal_duration_minutes || 120 }}::int AS meal_duration_minutes,
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.cleaning_buffer_minutes || 15 }}::int AS cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.customer_confirmed_sql }}::boolean AS customer_confirmed,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source_channel,
    NULLIF('{{ String($('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Check Existing Reservation').item.json.reservation_exists ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::boolean AS reservation_exists,
    {{ $('Check Closure For Request').item.json.is_closed ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }}::boolean AS is_closed
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO reservations (
    restaurant_id,
    client_id,
    conversation_id,
    source_channel,
    status,
    party_size,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    meal_duration_minutes,
    cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    special_request,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    i.restaurant_id,
    i.client_id,
    i.conversation_id,
    COALESCE(i.source_channel, 'retell_voice'),
    'confirmed',
    i.party_size,
    i.start_time,
    i.start_time + (i.meal_duration_minutes || ' minutes')::interval,
    i.meal_duration_minutes,
    i.cleaning_buffer_minutes,
    NULLIF(i.special_request, ''),
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input i
  WHERE i.action = 'create_reservation'
    AND i.customer_confirmed = true
    AND i.restaurant_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.client_id IS NOT NULL
    AND i.start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND i.party_size IS NOT NULL
    AND i.reservation_exists = false
    AND i.is_closed = false
  ON CONFLICT (restaurant_id, conversation_id, start_time)
  WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL
  DO UPDATE SET
    updated_at = reservations.updated_at
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS reservation_created,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS reservation_id,
  (SELECT client_id FROM inserted) AS client_id,
  (SELECT status FROM inserted) AS reservation_status,
  (SELECT start_time FROM inserted) AS start_time,
  (SELECT end_time FROM inserted) AS end_time,
  (SELECT conversation_id FROM inserted) AS conversation_id;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS channel_conversation_logs (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT,
  conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  external_event_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  call_id TEXT,
  sms_id TEXT,
  email_message_id TEXT,
  instagram_message_id TEXT,
  source TEXT NOT NULL,
  channel TEXT NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  email TEXT,
  summary TEXT,
  transcript TEXT,
  user_message TEXT,
  raw_payload JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE (conversation_id, external_event_id)
);

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Lookup Restaurant Context').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id_sql }}::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.external_event_id_sql }}::text AS external_event_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.call_id_sql }}::text AS call_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.sms_id_sql }}::text AS sms_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_message_id_sql }}::text AS email_message_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.instagram_message_id_sql }}::text AS instagram_message_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }}::text AS channel,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.provider_sql }}::text AS provider,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.phone_sql }}::text AS phone,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.email_sql }}::text AS email,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.summary_sql }}::text AS summary,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.transcript_sql }}::text AS transcript,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.user_message_sql }}::text AS user_message,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.raw_payload_sql }} AS raw_payload,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.action_sql }}::text AS action
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO channel_conversation_logs (
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    external_event_id,
    call_id,
    sms_id,
    email_message_id,
    instagram_message_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    phone,
    email,
    summary,
    transcript,
    user_message,
    raw_payload,
    created_at
  )
  SELECT
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    external_event_id,
    call_id,
    sms_id,
    email_message_id,
    instagram_message_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    phone,
    email,
    summary,
    transcript,
    user_message,
    raw_payload,
    NOW()
  FROM input
  WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL
    AND external_event_id IS NOT NULL
    AND action IN ('log_conversation', 'message_inbound', 'check_availability', 'create_reservation', 'get_restaurant_context')
  ON CONFLICT (conversation_id, external_event_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.summary, channel_conversation_logs.summary),
    transcript = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.transcript, channel_conversation_logs.transcript),
    user_message = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.user_message, channel_conversation_logs.user_message),
    raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS log_saved,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS log_id;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS outbound_messages (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  restaurant_id BIGINT,
  conversation_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source TEXT NOT NULL,
  channel TEXT NOT NULL,
  provider TEXT,
  recipient TEXT,
  sender TEXT,
  subject TEXT,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload JSONB,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $('Build Unified Business Response').item.json.restaurant_id || 'NULL' }}::bigint AS restaurant_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.conversation_id_sql }}::text AS conversation_id,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text AS source,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.channel_sql }}::text AS channel,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.provider_sql }}::text AS provider,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.from_sql }}::text AS recipient,
    {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.to_sql }}::text AS sender,
    CASE
      WHEN {{ $('Verify Channel Source').item.json.source_sql }}::text = 'email' THEN 'Réponse à votre demande de réservation'
      ELSE NULL
    END::text AS subject,
    '{{ String($('Build Unified Business Response').item.json.reply || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS content,
    '{{ JSON.stringify($('Build Unified Business Response').item.json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS payload
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO outbound_messages (
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    recipient,
    sender,
    subject,
    content,
    payload,
    status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    restaurant_id,
    conversation_id,
    source,
    channel,
    provider,
    recipient,
    sender,
    subject,
    content,
    payload,
    'pending',
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  FROM input
  WHERE source IN ('email', 'instagram')
    AND recipient IS NOT NULL
    AND content IS NOT NULL
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inserted) AS outbound_queued,
  (SELECT id FROM inserted) AS outbound_message_id,
  (SELECT source FROM inserted) AS queued_source,
  (SELECT channel FROM inserted) AS queued_channel,
  (SELECT recipient FROM inserted) AS queued_recipient;

parameters.jsCode:
const req = $('Verify Channel Source').item.json;
const business = $('Build Unified Business Response').item.json;
const queue = $('Queue Outbound Message When Needed').item.json;

const route =
  req.source === 'retell_voice' ? 'retell_voice_webhook' :
  req.source === 'retell_sms' ? 'retell_sms_webhook' :
  req.source === 'instagram' ? 'instagram_webhook_ack' :
  req.source === 'email' ? 'email_webhook_ack' :
  'generic_webhook_response';

const retellBody = {
  ok: business.ok,
  action: business.action,
  decision: business.decision,
  reply: business.reply,
  available: business.available,
  confirmed: business.confirmed,
  duplicate: business.duplicate,
  reservation_id: business.reservation_id,
  client_id: business.client_id,
  restaurant_id: business.restaurant_id,
  restaurant_slug: business.restaurant_slug,
  restaurant_name: business.restaurant_name,
  conversation_id: business.conversation_id,
  missing_fields: business.missing_fields,
  error_code: business.error_code,
  source_verification_status: business.source_verification_status,
  source_warnings: business.source_warnings
};

const asyncAckBody = {
  ok: true,
  accepted: true,
  route,
  source: req.source,
  channel: req.channel,
  provider: req.provider,
  conversation_id: req.conversation_id,
  outbound_queued: !!queue.outbound_queued,
  outbound_message_id: queue.outbound_message_id ?? null,
  reply_preview: business.reply,
  note: 'Message reçu par n8n. La réponse canal est mise en file outbound_messages pour envoi par un workflow provider dédié.'
};

const genericBody = {
  ok: business.ok,
  route,
  source: req.source,
  channel: req.channel,
  business_response: business,
  queue
};

const response_body =
  route === 'retell_voice_webhook' || route === 'retell_sms_webhook'
    ? retellBody
    : (route === 'email_webhook_ack' || route === 'instagram_webhook_ack'
      ? asyncAckBody
      : genericBody);

return [{
  json: {
    ...business,
    route,
    response_body,
    outbound_queued: !!queue.outbound_queued,
    outbound_message_id: queue.outbound_message_id ?? null,
    returned_to_same_provider:
      (req.source === 'retell_voice' && route === 'retell_voice_webhook') ||
      (req.source === 'retell_sms' && route === 'retell_sms_webhook') ||
      (req.source === 'email' && route === 'email_webhook_ack') ||
      (req.source === 'instagram' && route === 'instagram_webhook_ack'),
    is_route_retell_voice: route === 'retell_voice_webhook',
    is_route_retell_sms: route === 'retell_sms_webhook',
    is_route_instagram: route === 'instagram_webhook_ack',
    is_route_email: route === 'email_webhook_ack'
  }
}];

parameters.content:
# Router multi-canal

Entrées explicites :
- Retell Voice
- Retell SMS
- Email
- Instagram
- Generic Webhook

Chaque entrée marque sa source avant normalisation.
Le router final vérifie que la source repart sur la bonne réponse HTTP.

Pour Email et Instagram, le blueprint met la réponse en file `outbound_messages` au lieu d'inventer un node provider non vérifié.

La vérification cryptographique Retell n'est pas active dans ce blueprint : le champ `X-Retell-Signature` est détecté, mais la validation par secret/API key devra être ajoutée ensuite.
